name: Prime
divergence: nothing was ever altered — this is our own universe, reported with total confidence and slight inaccuracy
world_style: present-day United States — recognizable suburbs, strip malls, highways, downtowns and county fairs, identical to our world
naming: ordinary American names, like a local newspaper — invented people only, never real public figures
